name: cyber_exchange
description: Exchange Rate (q.side_exchange, slot 34, Cyber City gym-7 pack) end-to-end on the Verified Value Teller: nurse rumor pointer (tip_exchange, gated not ci_reserves_done, latches met_cyber_nurse), accept at the kiosk (ci_reserves_active + THE EXCHANGE RATE title), re-verify the three reserve-tag props downtown in 1-2-3 order (each latches ci_reserve_N via sidequest/exchange/note_N with a unique tellraw tail, so a wrong-prop interact is caught twice), a premature turn-in nudge after tag 1 (count-check holds: 'Not all re-verified yet', no ci_reserves_done), full turn-in (900 CD skewed payout via the COMPANY-branded rail - the attribution receipt is the point - + ADJUSTMENT title + ci_reserves_done), then the paid_out entry. Available pre-Volt - NO prerequisite tags faked, NO battle on this chain (zero TBCS stall exposure). The reserve props pair up physically with the signal boards (1490/1560/1610 corners) but display names differ, so find_npc never confuses them. reward/standard candies NOT asserted (memory_fragment-scaled, unpinned - miller/noncompliance precedent); the branded line-item roll after the receipt is random-pool and deliberately un-asserted; CobbleDollars ride upward on re-runs. DO NOT run before ground-probing _probe_pending - every tp Y below is an authored town-placement placeholder.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: Cyber City downtown is a town safe zone. Nurse Ampere 1478,65,1150; teller kiosk 1500,65,1120 (37b - beyond the 32b interact chase, so tp); reserve_1 1490,64,1128 (13b NW of the kiosk, chase covers it); reserve_2 1560,64,1092 and reserve_3 1610,64,1112 are cross-downtown tp hops. All Ys are authored placeholders - see _probe_pending. --

steps.comment_: leftover-dialog guard: a prior scenario's stale screen would eat the first interact

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): the accept latch, the done latch, the three prop tags, the nurse-met latch --

steps.comment_: latch spawns within 40b + band_tags resync of the no_* inverses (tip_exchange gates not ci_reserves_done)

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Nurse Ampere rumor hub - tip_exchange renders (gate: not ci_reserves_done) and latches met_cyber_nurse --

steps.comment_: open_dialog swap to the rumors entry needs a packet round-trip before the dump

steps.wait_chat: re-verify the reserve tags the Company stopped checking

steps.comment: -- beat 2: the teller at the kiosk - accept. say[] rotates, so the any-of covers both lines --

expect_screen_text: Verified Trust, Verified Value - that is the slogan on the wall behind me, and I cannot look at it. The board reads fifty-six. That is not a rate, that is a scream.
The Company is supposed to verify the nether-star reserves that back every coin. They stopped. Would you walk downtown and re-verify three reserve tags for me. I need to know how bad it is.

steps.comment: -- beat 3: reserve tag 1 (1490,64,1128 - 13b NW, nearest 'Reserve Tag' by 50b+; the interact chase covers the gap) --

expect_screen_text: A nether-star reserve placard. The current signature is fresh ink over a sanded-off older one. The Company says it was always this one signature.
A reserve placard for the stars that back the coin. Somebody sanded a name off and re-signed it. The stamp is new. The paper is old.

steps.comment: -- beat 4: premature turn-in - the count-check must HOLD with 1/3 tags --
-- beat 5: reserve tag 2 (cross-downtown tp - 66b, buildings defeat straight-line walking) --
-- beat 7: full turn-in - accepted entry (prio 30), payout via exchange/reward (payout_company: the branded receipt IS the tell) --

expect_screen_text: Three reserve tags, posted downtown. Re-verify each one and bring me the count. If the star reserves are short, at least we will know it and not just feel it.
You checked the tickets in wheat country, did you not. This is the same rot, three towns further gone. Bring me the count when you have all three.

steps.comment: -- beat 8: paid_out entry (prio 40) replaces the accept --

expect_screen_text: Three tags, re-verified. Every one re-signed over somebody older. That is not accounting, that is a cover story with a stamp on it.
Someone is offering an alternative south of here. Grain, they say. After what those tags showed me, maybe I should listen.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip every tag this scenario set (mystic precedent); CobbleDollars ride --
